features.name: case item with nested if checking external input signals
features.description: Code should include a case statement item containing a nested if statement that checks input signals coming from other modules (e.g., CDC synchronizer outputs)

features.name: state-based case with bitwise shift conditions
features.description: Code should include a case statement that checks state signals using bitwise operations and shifts (e.g., state_q >> 3U) to determine which branch to take
features.snippet:
if ((1U & (~ (state_q >> 3U)))) begin
  if ((4U & state_q)) begin
    if ((1U & (~ (state_q >> 1U)))) begin
      if ((1U & (~ state_q))) begin
        // branch logic
      end
    end
  end
end

features.name: combinational signal assignment dependent on cross-module inputs
features.description: Code should include a combinational signal assignment (req_pwrup_d) that is conditionally set based on input signals from other modules, where the signal is first set to a default value and then conditionally updated
